history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young woman with dark hair pulled back and bangs frames her face, wearing a light-colored, loose-fitting outfit and white Crocs, is seated on a silver Vespa scooter. She is leaning forward with her hands on the handlebars, looking back at the camera with a playful smile. The scooter is positioned on a cracked asphalt road.

The background is a lush, somewhat overgrown natural landscape. To the left, a modern-looking building with large windows and wooden accents is nestled among tall trees. The rest of the background is dominated by a dense forest of tall, slender trees with a muted, cool-toned foliage. The ground is covered in dry brush and vegetation, suggesting a slightly chilly or dry climate.

The overall lighting is soft and diffused, possibly indicating an overcast day or early morning/late afternoon light, creating a slightly desaturated and cool color palette with dominant grays, greens, and muted browns. The mood is casual, cheerful, and adventurous, with a touch of natural beauty. The style is realistic, with a focus on the subject and her scooter within the natural environment.
